trigger: 角色弧光终点：经历重生后的报复、纠缠、厌倦，最终真正放下对沈词的执念与怨恨，选择独立生活，不再为婚姻定义自我价值，神情从清冷转为通透平和

appearance_delta.face: 杏眼依旧明亮但不再凌厉，眉峰舒展不再紧蹙，薄唇微微放松不再紧抿，整体神情从清冷倔强转为一种历经风雨后的平和通透，偶有淡淡笑意
appearance_delta.body: 产后恢复，身形仍纤细但不再是孕期的病态消瘦，肩背挺直且自然舒展
appearance_delta.hair: 乌黑长发以银簪半挽回归日常，但整体打理更为从容整洁，发质恢复顺滑
appearance_delta.distinguishing_features: 不再频繁触碰颈侧，双手自然垂落或轻抱女儿沈昭昭

costume_override.outfit: 浅青交领襦裙搭配银灰褙子，风格依旧素净简洁但比此前更添几分从容气度，腰系细绦，佩一枚小巧玉坠作为唯一饰物

visual_reference: A young Chinese woman around 19 years old in a light cyan cross-collar ruqun with a silver-grey outer beizi, black hair half-pinned with a silver hairpin with the rest falling smoothly over her shoulders, sharp almond eyes now softened with a serene and clear gaze showing inner peace and quiet strength, thin lips relaxed with the faintest hint of a calm smile, slender upright posture with naturally relaxed shoulders, a small jade pendant at her waist, standing at the entrance of a traditional Chinese courtyard looking outward toward an open road with morning sunlight streaming in, warm yet gentle lighting, soft breeze, cinematic composition, highly detailed, 8k
visual_prompt_negative: angry expression, cold gaze, pursed lips, tears, dark lighting, gloomy atmosphere, heavy makeup, bright red clothing, wedding dress, modern clothing, glasses, tattoo, Western features, fantasy armor, wings
emotional_tone: 释然通透——放下执念后的轻盈与自由，不再被怨恨或婚姻定义，是角色弧光的最高点，带着淡淡的温暖与对未来的平静期许
